prompt: Update the manuscript context for project Collab-IEM-NanoplasticZeolites. Add a new anticipated reviewer concern: the study uses a rigid zeolite framework, but framework flexibility may affect diffusion of polymer fragments at narrow pore windows.

assertions.description: manuscript-context.md contains 'rigid' or 'framework flexibility' or 'diffusion' in Known weaknesses section
manuscript-context.md still contains original concerns about Al substitution and TraPPE-UA
Target journal, Working title, Key claims, and Computational methods sections unchanged from fixture
